meaning: n.(有抽屉或格子的)橱柜,<美>内阁adj.<美>内阁的,小巧的
examples: The china was displayed in a glass cabinet.
She secreted the gun in the kitchen cabinet.
The cabinet rallied behind the Prime Minister.
Interior Minister Rashid Nurgaliyev told a televised cabinet meeting police had launched a major investigation.
Two UK Cabinet Ministers flanking the Welsh Finance Minister in the Welsh Government's Cathays Park HQ.
